image:image.image:title: MilkDrop Visualizer | Stims
image:image.image:caption: MilkDrop-inspired browser music visualizer with demo audio, hand-picked presets, and ways to react to your own music.

image:image.image:title: Compatibility and Performance | Stims
image:image.image:caption: Guide to browser support, lighter visual modes, and what to expect on older devices.
